title: oncella gracilis
intro: Oncella gracilis, also known as the "Fragrant Onosma" or "Dyer's Knotweed", is a flowering plant species that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant is traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Oncella gracilis include reducing fever, treating wounds and skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Oncella gracilis is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, and can also be used in tincture or decoction form to harness its medicinal properties.
